inspiration.title: @money_glitchai · Instagram · 26s · 4,156 likes
inspiration.insight: Use a shocked face hook, numbered proof steps, and a strong ROI reveal without requiring any street shooting.

subtitle.zh:
千万别让我老板
知道这个
subtitle.en:
DO NOT let my boss
find out about this

scenes.assetPath: source/竞品分析：抓取社媒界面.mp4

subtitle.zh:
我只输入了一个问题
它开始抓真实社媒信号
subtitle.en:
I typed one question
and it pulled real social signals

subtitle.zh:
不是几条评论截图
是直接整理成痛点报告
subtitle.en:
Not random screenshots
an actual pain-point report

scenes.assetPath: source/竞品分析：报告结果中总结的三个痛点.mp4

subtitle.zh:

subtitle.en:
